name: Sentinel 5
area: Global coverage, focusing on atmospheric composition
quality: High-quality atmospheric data with high sensitivity and precision for trace gases and aerosols
availability: Free and open access via Copernicus Dataspace Ecosystem
update_frequency: Daily (depending on coverage area and mission conditions)
legal_restrictions: Open data policy under the Copernicus program
description: Sentinel-5 precursor is equipped with the TROPOMI instrument, and provides key atmospheric composition data to monitor air pollution, greenhouse gases, and aerosols.
variable_s: Ozone (O₃), Nitrogen Dioxide (NO₂), Carbon Monoxide (CO), Sulphur Dioxide (SO₂), Methane (CH₄), Aerosols, Formaldehyde (HCHO), Ozone Depleting Substances (ODS)
spatial_resolution: 7 km (at nadir) for most species, 3.5 km for some species (specific conditions)
api_protocol:
The Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem catalogue is a web service that can be queried through 4 REST protocols
  - OData
  - STAC
  - OpenSearch
  - Sentinel Hub Catalog API
limitations: Some cloud coverage interference; limited resolution in certain areas; requires atmospheric correction for some products
